name: agnosis/breadcrumb-icon-link
title: Breadcrumb Icon Link
description: A single icon-only link (Biography, Events, or a Contact popover) to/about the current artist, or a plain-text Language badge showing their native language as a two-letter code. Renders nothing if there's nothing to show (no biography/events yet, the artist has turned contact off, or no native language is set), or off an artist subdomain.
